title: Create skills for Databricks Assistant
body:
You can now create skills to extend Databricks Assistant in Agent mode with specialized capabilities for domain-specific tasks. User skills follow the open [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io/) standard and are automatically loaded when relevant.

See [Extend Genie Code with agent skills](/aws/en/genie-code/skills).

ref_links.text: Extend Genie Code with agent skills
